personalization agent — pilot → production in weeks.
assure1 Trust Mark; run1 scales it through peak → expand.

svg.text: ① Composed, not custom — retail1 configures the 1 Suite (supply1 + customer1 + market1) for retail; built fast on proven products.
② Human approves commitments — agents draft & recommend; people approve every PO, price change, promo & publish.
③ Grounded & truthful — recommendations tie to real catalog & stock; marketing is honest, reviewed before publish.
④ Brand-safe & private — on-brand by default; consumer data consent-based; the brand owns its creative.
⑤ Reliable at peak — run1 scales through sale events & peak season; assure1 certifies before go-live.
⑥ Outcome-led — stock, conversion, margin & cost, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
